name: Chinese Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice until it is tender.
2. Rinse with hot and cold water.
3. Make a sauce by melting butter, mixing with flour, and adding milk. Cook until thickened.
4. Beat the egg yolks and add the rice, sauce, seasonings (salt, paprika), and cheese to the mixture.
5. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Pour the mixture into a greased shallow pan.
8. Bake for 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes.
9. Serves 6.
